finding_addressed: codex §9 review [P1] BLOCK — G8 dangling-edge pass used a per-edge batch[i+1..].any(..) in-batch-supersession scan, O(N²) under the single-writer txn (bulk-write ingestion-stall risk).
fix_summary: Added `HashMap` to the std::collections import. Replaced the per-edge O(N²) `batch[i+1..].iter().any(..)` supersession scan in commit_batch's G8 block with a single O(N) pre-pass building `last_index: HashMap<(&str,&str), usize>` keyed by (logical_id.as_str(), kind.as_str()), inserting front-to-back so the stored value is the LAST (highest) index per key. In the counting loop an edge at index i with Some(lid)/kind is in-batch-superseded iff `last_index[(lid,kind)] > i` (via `.is_some_and(|&last| last > i)`). Edges with logical_id None never matched. Probe stmt, independent from/to EXISTS probe, saturating_add, flag-and-count never-rollback semantics all unchanged. Explanatory comment extended to describe the precompute + equivalence.
byte_identical_proof: Old code skipped edge i iff ∃ j>i with same (Some(lid),kind). New code skips edge i iff last_index[(lid,kind)] > i. last_index[(lid,kind)] is by construction the max index j with that key; max_j > i ⇔ ∃ j>i with that key. So the skip-set — and therefore the per-endpoint EXISTS probe set and the dangling_edge_endpoints count — is identical for every possible batch.

red_green_evidence.scenario: batch = [node A; edge(rel, A->GHOST, lid=E); edge(rel, A->A, lid=F); edge(rel, A->A, lid=E)]; the later (E,rel) edge tombstones the earlier dangling-GHOST one; expects count 0.
red_green_evidence.RED: Temporarily replaced `last_index.insert(..)` with `last_index.entry(..).or_insert(i)` (first-index bug): case (g) FAILED with left=1 right=0 (it probed the superseded GHOST endpoint). Other 7 cases stayed green — confirms (g) specifically guards the last-index ordering. RED was demonstrated transiently and reverted; not committed.
red_green_evidence.GREEN: With the correct last-index `insert(..)`, all 8 pr_g8 cases pass.

pr_g8_cases: 8/8 PASS (7 pre-existing: (a) one-missing=1, (b) same-batch-later-node=0, (c) edge→superseded=2, (d) flag-and-count commits, (e) sum-over-both=2, (f) EXPLAIN-QUERY-PLAN uses canonical_nodes_logical_active_idx + no SCAN, legacy NULL-logical_id=2; + new (g) last-index precompute guard).
